content: Should upgrade the skills a bit as well in case you haven’t

Have you upgraded the characters skills? I would also recommend use a poison character so you can maintain pressure on the boss and not have to worry about choosing whether to defend/heal or to attack/debuff
How Lucky
Because you are using a team of weird mechanic
24 in blue is Poison user (your team wasn't poison team.in the first place)
Caecus doesn't really have anything to do with the team because he mostly plays counterattack even though he can do a little heal (still meh)
By owning 24, I guess you are at least a 0.5 anni player, and haven't even farmed pizza
Can't just brute force your way on mainstory by stuffing a bunch of good awakers together
Now that I checked through your account awakers, you owned a bunch of limited awakers tho, including Thais
slacking too much from 0.5 anni huh

I got away with using a retaliate team at I think it was around where you are for investigator. I used... Murphy, Pandia, Caecus, Nautila.

Atm it just looks like your team lacks more synergy. You can make your team tankier by just going with a shielder. I've also done the fight with Tulu, Caecus, Murphy, Nautila
tl;dr you have 2 attackers, try swapping one to another defense oriented char
& make sure you're using covenants
